name: Splendiferous Guacamole Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Diced Fresh Cilantro (chopped), or 1/4 cup Crushed Dried Cilantro
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and pit the avocados, then coarsely mash them in a bowl with a fork.
2. Mix in the lime juice, blending well.
3. Add the diced tomatoes, blending until smooth.
4. Incorporate the yellow onion, blending again to combine.
5. Stir in the hot sauce, ensuring it's evenly distributed.
6. Gradually add the cilantro (fresh or dried), blending after each addition.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
8. Garnish with sour cream and sprinkle a little cilantro on top.
9. Serve at room temperature or chilled. Makes about 5 1/4 cups of dip.
10. Suggested Dippers: Warm Tortilla Chips, Baby Corn, Black Olives, Jicama, Mushrooms
